result.stdout:
USAGE: [dotnet] hotspot [--help] [<subcommand> [<options>]]

SUBCOMMANDS:

    recommend <options>   Generates recommendations of code hotspots.

    Use '[dotnet] hotspot <subcommand> --help' for additional information.

OPTIONS:

    --help                display this list of options.

result.stdout:
ERROR: unrecognized argument: '-h'.
USAGE: [dotnet] hotspot recommend [--help] [--repository-directory <repo dir>]
                                  [--scc-file <scc file path>]

OPTIONS:

    --repository-directory, -r <repo dir>
                          The root of the git repository. Default: Execution
                          directory
    --scc-file <scc file path>
                          The JSON file output of running SCC (example `scc
                          --by-file --format json > scc_out.json`)
    --help                display this list of options.
